summary: Review of fix commit addressing external review #2 feedback from berendt. Three of four WARNING findings were addressed: W-002/W-003 (no-op kubelet projection wait loops) correctly removed from both E2E tests with clear explanatory comments; W-004 (brittle Containers[0] assertion) fixed with name-based container lookup using the shared findContainerByName helper. W-001 (stray CC-0075 commit) remains unaddressed but is a branch-hygiene issue outside this diff's scope. One issue found and fixed during review: the VolumesMaintained test initially used an inline container-by-name loop instead of the existing findContainerByName shared helper — corrected to use the helper consistent with 22+ call sites across 8 files in the same package.

tests_checklist.item: Affected tests use shared helpers consistently

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is as simple as possible

issues_found.description: Inline container-by-name loop reimplemented the existing findContainerByName shared helper. This helper is defined in security_context_test.go:20 and used at 22+ call sites across 8 test files in the same package. Fixed during review by replacing the inline loop with a findContainerByName call.
issues_found.evidence: Original code used inline for-range loop; now uses the shared helper matching integration_test.go:1786 and 21 other call sites.
